Query: Hey, I just deposited into the BYUSD-HONEY vault on Berachain and I have a few questions. First, is this vault leveraged or is it just auto-compounding? Second, the eAPR shows 24% but after a week my actual return looks way lower � is something wrong? And lastly, if the market crashes hard, can I actually lose my full deposit or is Origami protecting me from that?
AI Response:
[{'type': 'text', 'text': 'Welcome to Origami Finance! To ensure you have the best experience, it is important to understand our core mechanism: **"Folding."** This is our term for automated leverage loops where the protocol deposits your asset, borrows against it, and buys more of the asset to multiply yield. This is fully automated, so you do not need to manage health factors manually.\n\nRegarding your specific questions about the **oAC BYUSD-HONEY** vault on Berachain:\n\n### 1. Leveraged vs. Auto-Compounding\nThe **BYUSD-HONEY vault is an oAC (Origami Auto-Compounder) vault, which is NOT leveraged.** \n*   **oAC Vaults:** These are yield-optimizing wrappers. On Berachain, they connect to Infrared LP positions to harvest iBGT rewards and auto-compound them back into the vault. Users simply hold the oAC token.\n*   **lovTokens:** These are our separate leveraged (folded) products. If you were in a "lovToken" vault, you would be using leverage. Since you are in an oAC vault, you are in a non-leveraged, auto-compounding position.\n\n### 2. eAPR vs. Realised Returns\nIt is common for short-term returns to look lower than the displayed eAPR. Here is why:\n*   **eAPR (Estimated APR):** This is a long-term projection that ignores entry and exit fees. It is best used for comparing vault performance over months, not days.\n*   **Realised APR:** This is your actual historical return, which **includes entry and exit fees**. \n*   **Fees:** Origami charges fees on deposit and withdrawal to protect the vault from economic attacks. These fees accrue to the vault reserves (benefiting all holders). Because you have only been in the vault for one week, the entry fee is likely still outweighing the yield earned so far. Over time, your yield should converge toward the eAPR.\n\n### 3. Risk of Total Loss\n*   **For oAC Vaults (Your current vault):** Since there is no leverage (no "folding"), there is no liquidation risk from a lending protocol. However, you are still exposed to the risks of the underlying assets (BYUSD and HONEY) and the Infrared platform. If the underlying LP tokens lose value or depeg significantly, your position value will drop.\n*   **For lovToken Vaults (Leveraged):** While Origami automates the "folding" process so you don\'t have to monitor it, extreme market volatility or a significant depeg of the underlying asset **can still trigger a liquidation**. In such a scenario, the value of a lovToken could go to zero.\n\nIf you have further questions, please check **docs.origami.finance** or join us in Discord!', 'extras': {'signature': ''}}]
